zh.Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾比斯法姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Dalton於1445年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾比斯法姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Dalton65歲，母親Margaret Holker36歲。他於大約1462年與Elizabeth Isabel Fleming在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Dalton于1445年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾比斯法姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Dalton65岁，母亲Margaret Holker36岁。他于大约1462年与Elizabeth Isabel Fleming在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1500年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Dalton was born in 1445, in Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Dalton, was 65 and his mother, Margaret Holker, was 36. He married Elizabeth Isabel Fleming about 1462, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1500.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Dalton est né en 1445, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Dalton, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Margaret Holker, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Isabel Fleming environ 1462, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1500.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Dalton 1445 in Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Dalton 65 und seine Mutter Margaret Holker 36. Er hat um 1462 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Isabel Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1500.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Dalton è nato il nel 1445 nel Bispham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Dalton, aveva 65 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Holker, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Isabel Fleming circa 1462, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1500.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Daltonが1445年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアビスファムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Daltonは65歳，母Margaret Holkerは36歳であった。約1462年にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Isabel Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Dalton(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 비스프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Dalton(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Holker(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1462년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Isabel Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Dalton nasceu em 1445, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Dalton, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Holker, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Isabel Fleming aproximadamente 1462, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1500.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Dalton родился в 1445 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Dalton было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Holker, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Isabel Fleming около 1462 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1500 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Dalton nació en 1445, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Dalton, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Margaret Holker, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Isabel Fleming aproximadamente 1462, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1500.
